headline: Truist Securities Maintains Buy on Leidos Holdings, Lowers Price Target to $195
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Tobey Sommer   maintains Leidos Holdings (NYSE:LDOS) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $220 to $195.
